actions.title: Monthly Infection Control Audit
actions.description: Conduct monthly ward audits to check hand hygiene, sterilisation, and PPE use. Report results to the clinical team and target a hospital-acquired infection rate below 2%.

actions.title: Staff Safety Training Programme
actions.description: Run quarterly safety workshops for all nurses and doctors covering error prevention, incident reporting, and clinical protocols to improve patient safety outcomes.

actions.title: JCI Accreditation Preparation
actions.description: Assign a coordinator to lead the Joint Commission International accreditation process, conduct gap assessments, and complete all corrective actions within 12 months.

actions.title: Deploy Electronic Health Record System
actions.description: Replace paper patient records with a cloud-based electronic health record platform. Train all clinical and admin staff and go live across all departments by year end.

actions.title: Automate Patient Scheduling and Billing
actions.description: Implement an online booking portal and automated billing system to reduce manual admin work, cut appointment no-shows by 30%, and speed up invoice processing.

actions.title: Upgrade Cybersecurity Infrastructure
actions.description: Audit all hospital IT systems, fix vulnerabilities, enable multi-factor authentication, and set up automated daily data backups to protect patient data.
